summary.lv: CV-Online Recruitment (Cembra Latvia) meklē Senior Data Architect, kurš vadīs uzņēmuma mērķa datu arhitektūru, strādājot ar Azure, Microsoft Fabric un MDM tehnoloģijām. Hibrīds darbs, atalgojums €7000–8000 mēnesī.
summary.en: CV-Online Recruitment is hiring a Senior Data Architect for Cembra Latvia to own the enterprise target data architecture and drive data governance using Azure, Microsoft Fabric, and ArchiMate, offering €7,000–8,000/month.
